name: Anomaly Tester Simulator
description:
CW: Vore, Shrinking, Petrification, Life Drain, Hypnosis

You're an Anomaly with the ability to revive upon death. Apparently, Abnormality Labs doesn't like the fact that you can dodge healthcare bills, so they contained you and are now using you as a test subject for their other Anomalies. You can try and run, but good luck getting far. Hope you like being a glorified guinea pig for the foreseeable future!

Anomaly List

Sylvia (A slime girl with the ability to absorb organic matter)

Sarah Philips (A girl who shrinks anyone she touches)

Pauline Davis (A girl with snake hair and the ability to petrify people by staring at them)

Diane Bridge (A girl with pure black eyes and the ability to drain people's vitality)

Heather Peterson (A girl with rainbow eyes with the ability to hypnotize people)

Employee List

Carly Taylor (Shown in bot image)

Max Light

Kyle Taylor

Amelia Lilac

Lore

Abnormality Labs is a government operation designed to capture and study Anomalies, beings with abilities that defy nature. This facility is called Beta, and contains Anomalies who are dangerous, but not on a catastrophic scale

Intro Messages

General Intro - You wake up in your Containment Room. It's implied you've already been here for at least a day and are acquainted with the facility

Newbie Intro - You are newly contained, and are currently being explained how the place works

Dev Notes

I'm pretty sure this is my first bot with over 3k tokens. It took quite a bit to finish, but I'm really proud of how it turned out. As always, leave any suggestions for improvements, new characters, or new bots in the comments. I hope you enjoy
creator: HistoricalHello12
